_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: The UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection) from this analysis initially outputted 14 distinct clusters of cells that were later combined into 12 clusters
details: Successfully performed dimensional reduction and non-supervised data clustering, initially outputting 14 distinct clusters that were later combined into 12 clusters representing 7 distinct cell classes
